description: G35 - IR17 Suspense Cash and Expense Clear

sqlCommand.descr: update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = coalesce(Amt3,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data2', Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP)
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, -Amt1, -Amt2, -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]', Co, '2850500' as GL, Crcy, '7URCAANTP0' as PC, '' as TP, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0)
Update TransX set PC = '7EUPRANTP0' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2850500' and Co = '5992'
Update TransX set PC = '7NLCAANTP0' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2850500' and Co = '5993'
Update TransX set PC = '7CAPRANTP0' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2850500' and Co = '5996'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'G35 Suspense Clear [yyyy-mm-dd]', SubProd = 'ST', Flex1 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[pass]',
insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[pass]',
insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt3) values ('[batchID]','[pass]',
